zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bourbon於1344年出生在法國奧維時，她的父親Duc Pierre De Bourbon I33歲，母親Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon31歲。她於1368年5月4日與Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年1月4日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bourbon于1344年出生在法国奧維时，她的父亲Duc Pierre De Bourbon I33岁，母亲Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon31岁。她于1368年5月4日与Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年1月4日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bourbon was born in 1344, in Auvergne, France, her father, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, was 33 and her mother, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, was 31. She married Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII on 4 May 1368, in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 January 1416, in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bourbon est née en 1344, à Auvergne, France, son père, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII le 4 mai 1368, à Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 janvier 1416, à Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bourbon 1344 in Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duc Pierre De Bourbon I 33 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon 31. Sie hat am 4. Mai 1368 in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Januar 1416 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourbon è nata il nel 1344 nel Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII il 4 maggio 1368, nel Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 gennaio 1416, nel Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourbonが1344年にフランスアウバーグンで生まれた時，父Duc Pierre De Bourbon Iは33歳，母Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbonは31歳であった。1368年5月4日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンンeラックでArnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年1月4日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンンeラックで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourbon(이)가 1344년 프랑스 오버그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duc Pierre De Bourbon I(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1368년 5월 4일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 e라크에서 Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 1월 4일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 e라크에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourbon nasceu em 1344, em Auvergne, França, seu pai, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII em 4 de maio de 1368, em Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1416, em Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bourbon родилась в 1344 г. в местности аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Duc Pierre De Bourbon I было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII 4 мая 1368 г. в местности нeрак, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 января 1416 г. в местности нeрак, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bourbon nació en 1344, en Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII el 4 de mayo de 1368, en Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de enero de 1416, en Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
